name: timeline-block
description: Show your story or memories on the web.
author: bPlugins

scripts.i18n-pot: wp i18n make-pot . languages/timeline-block.pot --exclude="src, node_modules, timeline-block" --skip-block-json && cp ./languages/timeline-block.pot ./languages/timeline-block-en_US.po
scripts.i18n: npm run i18n-pot && npm run i18n-json && npm run i18n-mo
scripts.bundle: wp-scripts build && npm run i18n && gulp bundle && gulp plugin_zip
